markdown_formatted:
## Meeting Purpose

[Discuss and plan the development of a website template gallery for StackBlitz, focusing on starter kits and templates.](https://fathom.video/share/nCpkzhssx2yWS12AH4Fnaspzgfkp41xo?tab=summary&timestamp=1.0)

## Key Takeaways

  - [A website template gallery could be a significant opportunity for StackBlitz, with high search volume and relatively low keyword difficulty](https://fathom.video/share/nCpkzhssx2yWS12AH4Fnaspzgfkp41xo?tab=summary&timestamp=188.0)
  - [The team will focus on creating a subdirectory on the StackBlitz domain as an orphan page to host the template gallery](https://fathom.video/share/nCpkzhssx2yWS12AH4Fnaspzgfkp41xo?tab=summary&timestamp=1605.0)
  - [The project will involve building a database of templates, generating template pages, and creating a user-friendly interface for browsing and filtering](https://fathom.video/share/nCpkzhssx2yWS12AH4Fnaspzgfkp41xo?tab=summary&timestamp=1727.0)

## Topics

### Market Research and Opportunity

  - [Analyzed existing template marketplaces (Webflow, Wix, Envato, etc.) and inspiration sites (Landbook, Site Inspire)](https://fathom.video/share/nCpkzhssx2yWS12AH4Fnaspzgfkp41xo?tab=summary&timestamp=270.0)
  - [Identified high search volume (1.9 million) for template-related keywords with relatively low difficulty](https://fathom.video/share/nCpkzhssx2yWS12AH4Fnaspzgfkp41xo?tab=summary&timestamp=664.0)
  - [Opportunity to create more descriptive, user-friendly template browsing experience](https://fathom.video/share/nCpkzhssx2yWS12AH4Fnaspzgfkp41xo?tab=summary&timestamp=576.0)

### Project Scope and Features

  - [Focus on website and landing page templates initially, not full applications](https://fathom.video/share/nCpkzhssx2yWS12AH4Fnaspzgfkp41xo?tab=summary&timestamp=276.0)
  - [Create a comprehensive database of templates with detailed metadata and descriptions](https://fathom.video/share/nCpkzhssx2yWS12AH4Fnaspzgfkp41xo?tab=summary&timestamp=261.0)
  - [Develop a user-friendly interface for browsing, filtering, and selecting templates](https://fathom.video/share/nCpkzhssx2yWS12AH4Fnaspzgfkp41xo?tab=summary&timestamp=576.0)
  - [Include prompts for each template to aid in customization and learning](https://fathom.video/share/nCpkzhssx2yWS12AH4Fnaspzgfkp41xo?tab=summary&timestamp=1019.0)

### Technical Implementation

  - [Build the gallery as a subdirectory on the StackBlitz domain (orphan page)](https://fathom.video/share/nCpkzhssx2yWS12AH4Fnaspzgfkp41xo?tab=summary&timestamp=1662.0)
  - [Use Superbase for the backend database, potentially synced with Airtable for CMS-like interface](https://fathom.video/share/nCpkzhssx2yWS12AH4Fnaspzgfkp41xo?tab=summary&timestamp=1999.0)
  - [Host the site using Vercel or similar platform](https://fathom.video/share/nCpkzhssx2yWS12AH4Fnaspzgfkp41xo?tab=summary&timestamp=1662.0)
  - [Utilize ShadCN or similar framework for frontend development](https://fathom.video/share/nCpkzhssx2yWS12AH4Fnaspzgfkp41xo?tab=summary&timestamp=1978.0)

### Content Generation Strategy

  - [Develop a data model and taxonomy for categorizing templates](https://fathom.video/share/nCpkzhssx2yWS12AH4Fnaspzgfkp41xo?tab=summary&timestamp=732.0)
  - [Use a combination of manual creation and AI-assisted generation for template content](https://fathom.video/share/nCpkzhssx2yWS12AH4Fnaspzgfkp41xo?tab=summary&timestamp=1727.0)
  - [Explore programmatic generation of simple templates using tools like Plot.ly](https://fathom.video/share/nCpkzhssx2yWS12AH4Fnaspzgfkp41xo?tab=summary&timestamp=1727.0)

### Integration with StackBlitz

  - [Implement easy "open in StackBlitz" functionality for templates](https://fathom.video/share/nCpkzhssx2yWS12AH4Fnaspzgfkp41xo?tab=summary&timestamp=1727.0)
  - [Provide prompts and instructions for customizing templates within StackBlitz](https://fathom.video/share/nCpkzhssx2yWS12AH4Fnaspzgfkp41xo?tab=summary&timestamp=1727.0)

### Potential Future Developments

  - Explore partnerships or integrations with other platforms (e.g., Webflow)
  - Consider adding more advanced features like stack customization or agency connections

## Next Steps

  - [Create a mock-up of the template gallery interface by Monday](https://fathom.video/share/nCpkzhssx2yWS12AH4Fnaspzgfkp41xo?tab=summary&timestamp=1920.0)
  - [Begin building the template database and content generation process](https://fathom.video/share/nCpkzhssx2yWS12AH4Fnaspzgfkp41xo?tab=summary&timestamp=1727.0)
  - [Investigate and set up the necessary infrastructure for hosting and deployment](https://fathom.video/share/nCpkzhssx2yWS12AH4Fnaspzgfkp41xo?tab=summary&timestamp=1727.0)
  - [Obtain StackBlitz credits for template generation and testing](https://fathom.video/share/nCpkzhssx2yWS12AH4Fnaspzgfkp41xo?tab=summary&timestamp=1727.0)
  - [Report back on progress by next week with initial prototype and content samples](https://fathom.video/share/nCpkzhssx2yWS12AH4Fnaspzgfkp41xo?tab=summary&timestamp=1872.0)
